hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r .tool_input.command); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+(reset\s+--hard|push\s+(-f|--force)|checkout\s+--\s+\.|clean\s+-f|branch\s+-D|stash\s+(drop|clear))"; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive git operation. If truly needed, ask the user for explicit approval." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r .tool_input.command); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+push\s+.*\b(main|master)\b"; then echo "BLOCKED: Cannot push directly to main/master. Use a feature branch and PR." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r .tool_input.command); BRANCH=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oP "(?<=(checkout\s-b|switch\s-c)\s)\S+"); if [ -n "$BRANCH" ] && ! echo "$BRANCH" | grep -qE "^(feature|fix|hotfix|release|chore)/[a-z0-9._-]+$"; then echo "BLOCKED: Branch name must match: (feature|fix|hotfix|release|chore)/description. Got: $BRANCH" >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r .tool_input.command); BRANCH=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oP "(?<=switch\s-c\s)\S+"); if [ -n "$BRANCH" ] && ! echo "$BRANCH" | grep -qE "^(feature|fix|hotfix|release|chore)/[a-z0-9._-]+$"; then echo "BLOCKED: Branch name must match: (feature|fix|hotfix|release|chore)/description. Got: $BRANCH" >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r .tool_input.command); MSG=""; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qP "\-m\s"; then MSG=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oP "(?<=-m\s[\x27\"]).*?(?=[\x27\"])"); elif echo "$CMD" | grep -q "cat <<"; then MSG=$(echo "$CMD" | sed -n "s/.*cat <<[\x27]*EOF[\x27]*//p" | head -1 | sed "s/^[[:space:]]*//"); fi; if [ -n "$MSG" ] && ! echo "$MSG" | grep -qE "^(feat|fix|docs|style|refactor|perf|test|build|ci|chore|revert)(\(.+\))?(!)?:\s"; then echo "BLOCKED: Commit message must use conventional format (e.g., feat: add login). Got: $MSG" >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path"); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qiE "\.(env|pem|key|p12|pfx)$|credentials\.json|secrets\.(yml|yaml|json)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Cannot write to sensitive file: $FILE. Use .env.example for documentation, keep actual secrets out of the repo." >&2; exit 2; fi'
